ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_iso3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., high, low, middle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code of the indicator (e.g., SP.ADO.TFRT) */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Adolescent Fertility Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., births per 1,000 women aged 15-19 years) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data point belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point measures */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_quality_flags" (
  "data_point_quality_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point quality flag */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the flag belongs to */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality flag (e.g., 'missing_data', 'outlier') */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_quality_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_quality_flags_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting collaboration */,
  "requestee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being requested to collaborate */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_requests_requestee_id FOREIGN KEY ("requestee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_sources" (
  "data_point_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point-source link */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the source of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_sources_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_category_links" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "category_id")
)
